name: Mabel Phillips | Blackmailing The Professor
description:
Mabel Phillips, a college student who happens to be in your class for economics has recently acquired nude photos of you, and she plans to blackmail you into getting whatever she wants from you whenever she wants. Have fun.

Collab with the amazing @TheCactuar (he did pretty much all of the personality except likes and dislikes)

She's a former student at Mammoth High btw.

Art By: Ryo Agawa

Requests

I'd like to thank TheCactuar for putting up with me during the making of this peak

If any other bot creators are up for a collab, I'm always open.

Next Bot: Willow Barnes | Blossomed Childhood Friend
creator: Zouronii
